tools.name: Intelligence Pack Hygiene Gate
tools.purpose_ru: Проверяет Intelligence Pack: обязательные индексы, SQLite, graph edges, отсутствие local/runtime/archive мусора.
tools.purpose_en: Checks Intelligence Pack required indexes, SQLite, graph edges, and absence of local/runtime/archive junk.
tools.validation_recipe: Run gate on builder-produced smoke pack and expect PASS_INTELLIGENCE_PACK_HYGIENE.
